title: Event Venue looking for Expert on Automation, Integration and Flow
excerpt:
Howdy!  A seasoned CRM guy looking for an expert to configure, automate and integrate Monday.com.  I have clear goals: 
Phase 1 CRM 

Manage CRM from Leads In to Close
Develop Reports and Dashboard Views for Event’s Team
…

posts.author: AuthenticTennessee (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Howdy! A seasoned CRM guy looking for an expert to configure, automate and integrate Monday.com. I have clear goals:

Phase 1 CRM

  • Manage CRM from Leads In to Close
  • Develop Reports and Dashboard Views for Event’s Team
  • Integrate Payment, Email and Text automations (content already developed)

Phase 2 Import Trello

  • Move 6 boards from Trello to Work Management
  • Create helpful Automations to improve productivity

Phase 3 Develop Event Management “Project” System

  • Analyze our current system and develop a program to replace it
  • Perform an “Export / Import” of existing events
  • Implement

We are looking at a fast turnaround for the CRM but the other projects can happen over a few months if necessary. Please contact me here, or at admin@williamsonfamilyfarm.com

Thank you!

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @AuthenticTennessee and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This sounds like a very interesting project and I appreciate you laying out your desired steps here. It is always nice to see a well rounded plan of attack from the get-go. I work with the team at CarbonWeb and we a monday.com Channel Partner that specializes in complex workflows and custom solution development.

While we always can build from the ground up, we also have end-to-end solutions on the marketplace like the CarbonCRM Suite. I provide a demo on this solution and would be happy to show it off if you want to start there. CRM Demo - Ricky

Otherwise if you want to tackle the whole picture on an initial call, you can schedule with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Fianlly, we are actually working on a new Suite that is based around festival/event management. I think there is a lot for us to talk about!

Good luck as you develop your ideal monday environment!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: AuthenticTennessee (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Ricky, we have a call tomorrow…

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @AuthenticTennessee ,

Welcome to the monday community!

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized CRM solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

Our team of experts also has a wealth of experience in creating most informative dashboards, allowing you to see all relevant data in a centralized view and make informed decisions.

We also are accustomed to creating both custom and native integrations, and can ensure that they are utilized to their fullest potential in optimizing your CRM by integrating with any other software you might use.

To add, we have also implemented extensive Project & Event Management solutions and can advise you to that end according to business and monday best practices.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
